node_sequence.description: SOPs context for geometry with purpose outputs
node_sequence.notes: Contains SOP network inside. File/Import geometry, connect to 'default' output for full-res render, PolyReduce (5-10%) to 'proxy' output, optional 'simproxy' output for physics.
One KMB per material, named descriptively (e.g., 'red', 'wood').

node_sequence.description: Auto-assigns materials to geometry within the component
node_sequence.notes: Handles the material binding between Component Geometry outputs and Material Library materials.

node_sequence.description: Exports the assembled component as a USD file
node_sequence.notes: Name defines the exported asset name. File path sets where the .usd is saved. Generate thumbnail via View Thumbnail Camera. Order: Generate Thumbnail -> Save to Disk.

constraints: Component Builder is a subnet containing componentgeometry, materiallibrary, componentmaterial, and componentoutput.
The 'default' output of Component Geometry maps to render purpose (full resolution).
The 'proxy' output maps to proxy purpose (low-poly for viewport).
The 'sim proxy' output maps to simulation proxy purpose (low-poly for physics).
Order of export operations: Generate Thumbnail FIRST, then Save to Disk.
To load the exported asset back into a scene, use a Reference LOP with the exported .usd file path.
test_criteria: Create a Component Builder subnet with: (1) Component Geometry with default and proxy outputs wired. (2) Material Library with at least one KMB. (3) Component Material auto-assigning. (4) Component Output with name and file path set. (5) Export produces a valid .usd file. (6) Reference LOP can load the exported asset back into a scene.

export_reference_roundtrip.description: After Save to Disk, use Reference LOP to paste the exported .usd path. The asset loads from disk as a reference, preserving variants and purposes.
